fix(ez-dialog): align CSS tokens with M3 dialog specification

- Fix headline fallback values to match headline-small typescale
  (2rem size, 2.66667rem line-height)
- Add missing letter-spacing to headline, content, and fullscreen headline
- Add missing font-weight to content (supporting text)
- Fix content fallback values to match body-medium typescale
  (1.16667rem size, 1.66667rem line-height)
- Fix fullscreen header gap from spacing-4 (1rem) to spacing-2 (0.5rem)
  per M3 spec 8dp padding between header elements
- Fix fullscreen headline to use title-large typescale instead of
  headline-small per M3 full-screen dialog spec (22pt/28pt line-height)

Closes #7

commit.message:
feat: update CSS generation scripts to output .scss files

Update all CSS generation scripts in packages/ui-js/node_scripts/gen-css/
to output .scss files instead of .css files for consistency with the
rest of the codebase:

- spacing.ts: Change fileName from 'spacing.css' to 'spacing.scss'
- font-size-props.ts: Change output path to 'font-size-props.scss'
- gen-material-themes.ts: Update all 6 variants to use .scss extensions
- Remove stale spacing.css file (replaced by generated spacing.scss)

This eliminates redundancy where both .css and .scss versions of the
same files existed, with only the .scss versions being imported by
the SCSS compilation chain.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: Add 14 new Ajax Control Toolkit extenders (#468)

* feat: Add TextBoxWatermarkExtender

Implements placeholder text for TextBox controls, matching the original
Ajax Control Toolkit TextBoxWatermarkExtender behavior.

- WatermarkText property for placeholder text
- WatermarkCssClass for styling the watermark state
- JS behavior handles focus/blur/input events

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: Add DragPanelExtender

Makes panels draggable by a handle element. Matches the original
Ajax Control Toolkit DragPanelExtender behavior.

- DragHandleID property to specify the drag handle element
- Falls back to entire target if no handle specified
- Handles edge cases (text selection, left-click only)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: Add ResizableControlExtender

Allows users to resize elements by dragging a handle. Matches the original
Ajax Control Toolkit ResizableControlExtender behavior.

- HandleCssClass for styling the resize handle
- ResizableCssClass applied while actively resizing
- Min/Max width and height constraints
- Creates resize handle if not found

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add DropShadowExtender and AlwaysVisibleControlExtender

- DropShadowExtender: CSS box-shadow with opacity, width, rounded corners, position tracking
- AlwaysVisibleControlExtender: Fixed positioning with 9 anchor points, offsets, animation support
- New enums: HorizontalSide, VerticalSide for positioning

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add RoundedCornersExtender and UpdatePanelAnimationExtender

- RoundedCornersExtender: Selective border-radius with BoxCorners enum, optional background color
- UpdatePanelAnimationExtender: MutationObserver-based update detection with CSS class and fade animations
- New enum: BoxCorners (flags for corner selection)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add PasswordStrength and MaskedEditExtender

- PasswordStrength: Real-time password quality indicator with text/bar modes, 5 strength levels
- MaskedEditExtender: Input masking for phone/date/SSN with configurable mask patterns
- New enums: DisplayPosition, StrengthIndicatorType, MaskType, InputDirection, AcceptNegative, DisplayMoney

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add ValidatorCalloutExtender and HoverMenuExtender

- ValidatorCalloutExtender: Validation error callout bubbles with positioning, highlight CSS, icons
- HoverMenuExtender: Hover-triggered popup menus with delays and positioning
- New enum: PopupPosition (TopLeft, TopRight, BottomLeft, BottomRight)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add SlideShowExtender

- SlideShowExtender: Image carousel with auto-play, navigation controls, slide titles/descriptions
- Client-side slide management via Slides parameter or data-slides attribute
- Play/pause, next/previous controls with configurable interval

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add ListSearchExtender and BalloonPopupExtender

- ListSearchExtender: Type-to-filter for ListBox/DropDownList with Contains/StartsWith matching
- BalloonPopupExtender: Styled tooltip balloons with pointer arrows, multiple trigger modes
- New enums: PromptPosition, QueryPattern, BalloonStyle, BalloonSize, BalloonPosition

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add docs, tests, and migration guide for new ACT extenders

Documentation (12 new files in docs/AjaxToolkit/):
- TextBoxWatermark, DragPanel, ResizableControl, DropShadow
- AlwaysVisibleControl, RoundedCorners, UpdatePanelAnimation
- PasswordStrength, ValidatorCallout, SlideShow, ListSearch, BalloonPopup
- Updated index.md with all new components

bUnit Tests (6 new test files, 104 tests):
- TextBoxWatermarkExtender, DropShadowExtender, PasswordStrength
- ValidatorCalloutExtender, ListSearchExtender, BalloonPopupExtender

Migration Toolkit:
- Updated AJAX-TOOLKIT.md with migration patterns for all 12 extenders

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: Set correct ACT defaults for HoverMenuExtender (HoverDelay=300, PopDelay=100)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

  structure, and links to documentation

commit.message:
refactor: rename architecture/ to arch/

Shorter directory name. Updated all path references in README.md,
copilot-instructions.md, and development.md.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: consolidate to single Go module with shared pkg/swagger

Implement ADR-024: single Go module (github.com/shaharby7/showbiz).

Structural changes:
- Root go.mod replaces per-service go.mod files
- New pkg/swagger/ shared package — RegisterRoutes(router, title, spec)
  serves Swagger UI at /swagger/ for any service
- All import paths updated from github.com/showbiz-io/... to
  github.com/shaharby7/...

Swagger UI added to both services:
- API: /swagger/ serves full OpenAPI spec with all 38 endpoints
- FakeProvider: /swagger/ serves machine CRUD spec
- Each service embeds its own openapi.yaml via //go:embed

Dockerfile updated:
- Build context is now repo root (copies go.mod, pkg/, service dir)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

arch: ADR-024 single Go module with shared pkg/ directory

Document that the entire repo uses a single Go module
(github.com/shaharby7/showbiz) with a top-level pkg/ directory for
shared packages. Services import shared code from pkg/ and keep
service-specific code in their own internal/.

- architecture/decisions.md: add ADR-024
- architecture/development.md: add Go Module Structure section, update
  directory tree to show go.mod at root, pkg/, and docs/

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: serve figures as static web assets (web/public/figures/)

  figures/ (gitignored scientific output) to web/public/figures/

- Update web/src/lib/utils.ts: figureUrl() now returns /figures/<path>

  Supabase URL override still available via NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_FIGURES_URL.

- Update scripts/web/extract_composite_site_data.py: checks existence in
  web/public/figures/ep_structure/ (where files are now committed).

- Copy 36 figures to web/public/figures/ (cluster, main, ep_structure).
  composite_figures_manifest.json now shows exists: true for all 15 entries.

Ensure CLASS type names always use global scope for Find All References

Add Route D in ReferencesProvider: if the word is a known CLASS type
(via ClassDefinitionIndexer), bypass findSymbol to prevent it being
scope-limited to 'parameter' or 'local'. Delegates to findProcedureReferences
which already handles global project + INCLUDE file searching.

  including endpoints, architecture diagram, and how they connect

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

perf: Performance benchmark suite - .NET Framework vs .NET 10 Blazor (#464)

* feat: Add performance benchmark suite comparing .NET Framework vs .NET 10

Benchmark infrastructure:
- Run-Benchmarks.ps1: Orchestrates IIS Express + dotnet run, measures cold start,
  warm avg, P95, min, max response times across multiple pages
- Generate-BenchmarkReport.ps1: Produces Markdown report with SVG bar charts
- Supports -SkipFramework, -Iterations, -WhatIf flags

Initial results (partial - some apps have pre-existing build issues):
- WingtipToys (.NET Framework 4.5.2): Home 8.7ms, ProductList 12.1ms, About 7.5ms
- AfterContosoUniversity (.NET 10 Blazor): Home 2.5ms, Students 9.6ms, About 3.8ms

Fixes #424

feat: add demo mode + smart CSV header detection

- Mock advisor returns realistic suggestions without Azure OpenAI

- GET /api/mode endpoint reports demo vs live mode

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: migrate figure serving to Supabase Storage

Figures are generated by the scientific pipeline and should NOT be
committed to git. This commit:

- Removes all 467 tracked binary figures from the git index
  (files remain on disk but are no longer tracked)
- Adds figures/**/*.png|jpg|svg|pdf to .gitignore to prevent
  future accidental commits
- Implements Supabase Storage support in figureUrl() utility:
 returns Supabase
      public URL (production mode, no files in git needed)
 falls back to /api/figures route (local dev mode,
      reads from filesystem)
- Adds scripts/web/upload_figures_to_supabase.py to sync generated
  figures from local disk to Supabase Storage bucket 'figures'
- Updates web/.env.example with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_FIGURES_URL
- Rewrites web/DEPLOYMENT.md with full Supabase Storage workflow

To restore figures in production:
  1. Create 'figures' bucket (public) in Supabase Storage
  2. Run: python scripts/web/upload_figures_to_supabase.py
  3. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_FIGURES_URL in Vercel env vars

Local dev continues to work without Supabase: figures served from
disk via /api/figures as long as they exist locally.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Hover: remove implementation body previews, add interface method label

- HoverFormatter: formatProcedure and formatMethodCall show location only (no body)
- MethodHoverResolver: resolveMethodDeclaration shows location only (no body)
- RoutineHoverResolver: show location only, no body preview
- VariableHoverResolver: detect INTERFACE methods, show '🔌 Interface method of X'
- Fix 'Declared in' append logic to handle property/method labels
- Update tests to not assert body preview content

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Hover improvements: class property display, F12 suppression on declaration, Ctrl+F12 guard on implementation, fix SELF.X false match on RHS, fix 3-part method class name extraction

- VariableHoverResolver: show '🔷 Class property of ClassName' for class fields
- VariableHoverResolver/HoverFormatter: suppress F12 link when hovering on declaration line
- MethodHoverResolver: guard fallback pattern to exclude MethodImplementation subtype
- StructureFieldResolver: suppress false dot-access match when cursor is past the field
- ClassMemberResolver: handle 3-part Class.Interface.Method scope in findClassMemberInfo

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: commit figures so Vercel can serve them via /api/figures route

Previously all figures/**/*.png were gitignored, so Vercel deployed
the site without any figure files on disk, causing all <Image> elements
to show broken icons.

Changes:
- Remove figures/**/*.png|jpg|pdf|svg from .gitignore
- Keep ignoring large data files (*.nc, *.csv, *.parquet)
- Commit all existing figures in figures/cluster/, figures/main/,
  figures/exploratory/, figures/ep1_full/, figures/ep1_vertical/
- Also commit updated .gitignore exception for figures/ep_structure/

The /api/figures route reads files relative to the repo root via
process.cwd()/.., which works on Vercel because the full repo is
checked out and web/ is the Root Directory.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: completion push notifications when appliances finish

- New APNs device token registration: POST /push-tokens/apns stores regular
  APNs tokens for alert notifications (separate from push-to-start tokens).
- New apns_tokens table for storing regular push notification tokens.
- sendAlertNotification/sendAlertToAll functions in apns.ts send standard
  alert notifications with title, body, and sound.
- Each device hook (miele, dishwasher, robot) now sends a completion push
  notification when transitioning from running → stopped.
- Completion alerts include device name (e.g. 'Washer Done') with friendly
  body text.
- Updated live-activity-hooks tests to mock new dependencies.
- Fixed lint: sorted imports, prefer-template, function ordering.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: immediate dismissal, consolidated throttle, keep-alive broadcasts

- All end events now use dismissal-date = now (was +5 min) so activities
  disappear from lock screen immediately when appliances finish.
- Consolidated broadcasts throttled to 10s to avoid flooding.
- 5-minute keep-alive interval re-broadcasts consolidated state while any
  device is running, preventing stale activities (stale-date is 15 min).
- Keep-alive stops automatically when all devices stop.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

v4.5.0: RC arrow keys for look + E for inventory toggle

- Arrow keys (Up/Down/Left/Right) control victim look direction (3 deg/tick)
- E key toggles victim inventory open/close (edge-detected toggle)
- New I flag in RC packet protocol for inventory state
- Visual indicators for arrow keys and E key in RC HUD
- Inventory stays open while E-toggled, closes when toggled off

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(plugin-registry): support src/common entry in generator to fix stale exports (#1108)

* Initial plan

* fix(plugin-registry): add src/common support to generator and regenerate registry

- Add src/common/index.ts variants to COMMON_ENTRY_BASENAMES in entries.ts
- Add dist/common/index.js variants to COMMON_DIST_ENTRY_BASENAMES in entries.ts
- Add hasExportedCommon filter in manifest-collector.ts (consistent with ui/worker/database)
- Add common export validation in validator.ts
- Regenerate registry.ts: location/route/shape plugins now correctly show
  exports: ["common","worker","icon","ui"] with common module entries

- Displays installed version and update status
- AutoUpdater.checkManual() for on-demand GitHub API check

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: configure GitHub Pages deployment with Astro build workflow

- Add site and base to astro.config.mjs for Sandotech/portfolio repo
- Update workflow to build Astro project before deploying dist/ folder

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

v4.4.3: Fix DISCONNECT and CONNECT crash

- DISCONNECT: Use mc.disconnect(Text) instead of world.disconnect()+mc.disconnect(Screen,bool)
- CONNECT: Disconnect first, then schedule connect on 500ms delay thread
- Both wrapped in try/catch to prevent crashes
- ConnectScreen.connect with proper MC 1.21.10 signature

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

v4.4.2: Fix PlayerInfo live view with GPU texture rendering
